subcodes.first_line: The Hidden Book hath descended from the heaven of revelation of your Lord, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Recite ye, then, what hath been made easy thereof, and follow it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مکنون نزل من سماء وحی ربکم المهیمن القیوم ان اقروا ما تیسر منه ثم اتبعوا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
